name: Reasonable Cause Penalty Abatement for Fuel Registration

eligibility.description: Available to persons required to register for fuel tax purposes who failed to do so but have a justifiable reason for non-compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid the $10,000 initial penalty and $1,000 daily recurring penalties for failure to register or reregister under section 4101 by showing reasonable cause.
